title: calamagrostis glacialis
intro: Calamagrostis glacialis, also known as Arctic bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Arctic tundra regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Calamagrostis glacialis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
